landing.feat_reply_body: English, Hindi, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. Detects what your customer wrote, replies in same language.

landing.feat_inbox_body: See all customer messages on your phone. Reply manually when bot doesn't know.
landing.feat_lang_body: Customer wrote Hindi? Replies in Hindi. Wrote Hinglish? Replies in Hinglish. Automatic.
landing.feat_ai_body: ₹699/mo. Smart fallback when no FAQ matches. Auto-translates English replies to customer's language.

testimonials.title: What owners say
testimonials.subtitle: Kiranas, cafés, salons and clinics across India — closing more orders on WhatsApp with Whatly.

items.quote: Earlier I had to take every order on the phone. Now Whatly replies on its own — I just focus on cooking.
Membership queries, class timings, renewals — all handled on WhatsApp before I even reach the floor.
It even understands Hinglish orders. Type '2 atta 1 dal' and the total's ready. My customers loved it.
My evening rush meant 30 missed messages. Now every client gets slots instantly and I book them right in chat.
Customers ping for kurti sizes and prices all day. Whatly shares the catalogue and books trials — I just stitch.
Appointment reminders alone cut my no-shows by half. Hours and FAQs are answered 24/7. Worth every rupee.

faq.title: Common *questions*
faq.subtitle: Everything owners ask before they switch. Still unsure? Just message us.

items.q: Will my customers know it's a bot?
items.a: They get instant, accurate answers in their language. Most assume it's you typing fast. You can mark replies with 🤖 if you want full transparency.

items.q: Do I need a special WhatsApp number?
items.a: Yes — a WhatsApp Business number (free, from the WhatsApp Business app). We connect to it via Meta's official integration.

items.q: What if a customer asks something my FAQs don't cover?
items.a: The message lands in your inbox marked 'Needs reply'. You reply manually, or enable the AI add-on (₹699/mo) for smart fallback replies.
English, Hindi (देवनागरी), Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. The bot detects what the customer wrote and replies in the same language.

items.q: How do I add new items / FAQs?
items.a: Edit directly in the dashboard, or edit your Google Sheet — the bot auto-syncs every 15 minutes. Most owners prefer the Sheet.

items.q: Is there a setup fee or commitment?
items.a: No setup fee. No commitment. 14-day free trial. Card not required for the trial.

footer.tagline: WhatsApp automation for ambitious Indian shops — auto-replies, orders and bookings in six languages.

restaurant.title: Restaurants
restaurant.blurb: Your busiest hours shouldn't mean missed orders. Whatly shares the menu, takes the order, totals it and locks in a pickup time — all inside WhatsApp, while you cook.
points: Captures and totals orders in chat
Never leaves a hungry customer on read
chat: 🍽️ Butter Naan ₹40 · Paneer Tikka ₹220 · Dal Makhani ₹180. Shall I place your order?
📝 ₹300 · Ready in 25 min. Pay on pickup?

kirana.title: Kirana Stores
kirana.blurb: Customers type the way they talk. Whatly reads messy Hindi & Hinglish lists, checks stock, totals the basket and queues it for cash-on-delivery — no app, no forms.
points: Checks stock and quotes live prices
chat: 📝 Order ₹680 · Pickup by 5 PM. Reply YES to confirm.

salon.title: Salons
salon.blurb: Stop pausing mid-haircut to answer the phone. Whatly shows open slots, books the appointment and sends the reminder — so your chair stays full and no-shows drop.
points: Cuts no-shows without a phone call
chat: Tomorrow's free: 11 AM, 2 PM, 5 PM. Which one?
✅ Booked — Haircut, tomorrow 2 PM. We'll send a reminder 🔔

clinic.title: Clinics
clinic.blurb: Patients ask the same things at all hours. Whatly answers timings and FAQs instantly, books OPD slots and flags urgent cases — so your front desk breathes easier.
chat: OPD today 4–8 PM. Shall I book an appointment?
Is the clinic open today? Is Dr. Mehta available?
Hello! 🩺 We're open 10–7. Dr. Mehta has a 4:30 PM slot free.
